---
title: "Prep data for Auto-ACMG"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-21"
---

# Aim

Prepare input data for the auto-ACMG pipeline (correct column names and annotations).

Somatic evidence codes used:
- benign somatic supporting: COSMIC missense codon count == 0
- pathogenic somatic moderate: COSMIC missense codon count > 2
- pathogenic somatic strong: COSMIC missense codon count > 10

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

dir.create("../../Data/auto_ACMG_input",  recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("../../Data/auto_ACMG_output", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r, message=FALSE}
RASopathies <- read_csv("../../Data/Gene_definitions/RASopathy_genes_VCEP_030425.csv",
                        show_col_types = FALSE) %>% pull(gene)

# ClinVar DDG2P build 38: provides Origin (de novo) and ReviewStatus
clinvar_meta <- read_tsv("../../Data/Clinvar_060225/Clinvar_build_38_DDG2P.tsv.gz",
                         show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::select(Chromosome, PositionVCF, ReferenceAlleleVCF, AlternateAlleleVCF,
                Origin, ReviewStatus) %>%
  mutate(
    chrom          = paste0("chr", Chromosome),
    de_novo_confirmed = grepl("de novo", Origin, ignore.case = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Chromosome)

# DATA_SOURCE: per-variant gnomAD population-max AF and CADD Phred scores,
#   generated by tabix annotation on the compute cluster.
#   Expected column names: chrom, pos, ref, alt, gnomad_popmax_af, cadd_phred
#   Expected files:
#     Data/Variant_lists/gnomad_CADD/Clinvar_DDG2P_missense_path_gnomad_popmax_CADD_Phred.tsv
#     Data/Variant_lists/gnomad_CADD/Clinvar_DDG2P_missense_benign_gnomad_popmax_CADD_Phred.tsv
#     Data/Variant_lists/gnomad_CADD/Clinvar_DDG2P_missense_VUS_gnomad_popmax_CADD_Phred.tsv
read_gnomad_cadd <- function(fname) {
  read_tsv(
    file.path("../../Data/Variant_lists/gnomad_CADD", fname),
    col_names = c("chrom", "pos", "ref", "alt", "gnomad_popmax_af", "cadd_phred"),
    show_col_types = FALSE
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      gnomad_popmax_af = as.numeric(if_else(gnomad_popmax_af == ".", "0", gnomad_popmax_af)),
      chrom = paste0("chr", chrom)
    )
}
```

```{r helper}
add_somatic_codes <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      pathogenic_somatic_supporting = FALSE,
      benign_somatic_supporting     = n_COSMIC_codon_count == 0,
      pathogenic_somatic_moderate   = n_COSMIC_codon_count > 2,
      pathogenic_somatic_strong     = n_COSMIC_codon_count > 10
    )
}

stars_from_status <- function(status) {
  s <- str_squish(str_to_lower(status))
  case_when(
    str_detect(s, "practice guideline")                                       ~ 4L,
    str_detect(s, "reviewed by expert panel")                                 ~ 3L,
    str_detect(s, "criteria provided, multiple submitters, no conflicts")     ~ 2L,
    str_detect(s, "criteria provided, conflicting classifications")           ~ 1L,
    str_detect(s, "criteria provided, single submitter")                      ~ 1L,
    str_detect(s, "no assertion criteria provided")                           ~ 0L,
    str_detect(s, "no classification provided")                               ~ 0L,
    str_detect(s, "no classification for the individual variant")             ~ 0L,
    TRUE ~ NA_integer_
  )
}
```

```{r clinvar-path, message=FALSE}
clinvar_path <- read_tsv(
  "../../Data/Variant_lists/Clinvar_DDG2P_missense_path_annot_240426_public.tsv.gz",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

AF_gnomad_path <- read_gnomad_cadd("Clinvar_DDG2P_missense_path_gnomad_popmax_CADD_Phred.tsv")

clinvar_path_ras <- clinvar_path %>%
  filter(gene %in% RASopathies) %>%
  left_join(AF_gnomad_path, by = c("chrom", "pos", "ref", "alt")) %>%
  left_join(clinvar_meta, by = c(
    "chrom",
    "pos" = "PositionVCF",
    "ref" = "ReferenceAlleleVCF",
    "alt" = "AlternateAlleleVCF"
  )) %>%
  add_somatic_codes() %>%
  dplyr::rename(revel = REVEL_score) %>%
  mutate(
    clinvar_stars              = stars_from_status(ReviewStatus),
    clinvar_star2plus          = clinvar_stars >= 2,
    clinvar_exact_path_star2plus = replace_na(clinvar_star2plus, FALSE),
    gnomad_min_cov             = NA_character_
  )

write_tsv(clinvar_path_ras,
          "../../Data/auto_ACMG_input/Clinvar_path_plus_somatic_codes_240426.tsv")
```

```{r clinvar-benign, message=FALSE}
clinvar_benign <- read_tsv(
  "../../Data/Variant_lists/Clinvar_DDG2P_missense_benign_annot_240426_public.tsv.gz",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

AF_gnomad_benign <- read_gnomad_cadd("Clinvar_DDG2P_missense_benign_gnomad_popmax_CADD_Phred.tsv")

clinvar_benign_ras <- clinvar_benign %>%
  filter(gene %in% RASopathies) %>%
  left_join(AF_gnomad_benign, by = c("chrom", "pos", "ref", "alt")) %>%
  left_join(clinvar_meta, by = c(
    "chrom",
    "pos" = "PositionVCF",
    "ref" = "ReferenceAlleleVCF",
    "alt" = "AlternateAlleleVCF"
  )) %>%
  add_somatic_codes() %>%
  dplyr::rename(revel = REVEL_score) %>%
  mutate(
    clinvar_exact_path_star2plus = FALSE,
    gnomad_min_cov               = NA_character_
  )

write_tsv(clinvar_benign_ras,
          "../../Data/auto_ACMG_input/Clinvar_benign_plus_somatic_codes_240426.tsv")
```

```{r clinvar-VUS, message=FALSE}
clinvar_VUS <- read_tsv(
  "../../Data/Variant_lists/Clinvar_DDG2P_missense_VUS_annot_240426_public.tsv.gz",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

AF_gnomad_VUS <- read_gnomad_cadd("Clinvar_DDG2P_missense_VUS_gnomad_popmax_CADD_Phred.tsv")

clinvar_VUS_ras <- clinvar_VUS %>%
  filter(gene %in% RASopathies) %>%
  left_join(AF_gnomad_VUS, by = c("chrom", "pos", "ref", "alt")) %>%
  left_join(clinvar_meta, by = c(
    "chrom",
    "pos" = "PositionVCF",
    "ref" = "ReferenceAlleleVCF",
    "alt" = "AlternateAlleleVCF"
  )) %>%
  add_somatic_codes() %>%
  dplyr::rename(revel = REVEL_score) %>%
  mutate(
    clinvar_exact_path_star2plus = FALSE,
    gnomad_min_cov               = NA_character_
  )

write_tsv(clinvar_VUS_ras,
          "../../Data/auto_ACMG_input/Clinvar_VUS_plus_somatic_codes_240426.tsv")
```

# Run Auto-ACMG

```{r run-acmg, eval=FALSE}
hotspots <- "../../Data/RASopathy_VCEP/rasopathy_hotspots.tsv"

# Baseline (no somatic weighting)
system(paste("Rscript ../../Scripts/ACMG_and_LRs/ACMG_auto.R",
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_input/Clinvar_path_plus_somatic_codes_240426.tsv",
             hotspots,
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_path_ACMG_240426.tsv"))

system(paste("Rscript ../../Scripts/ACMG_and_LRs/ACMG_auto.R",
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_input/Clinvar_benign_plus_somatic_codes_240426.tsv",
             hotspots,
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_benign_ACMG_240426.tsv"))

system(paste("Rscript ../../Scripts/ACMG_and_LRs/ACMG_auto.R",
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_input/Clinvar_VUS_plus_somatic_codes_240426.tsv",
             hotspots,
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_VUS_ACMG_240426.tsv"))

# With somatic weighting
system(paste("Rscript ../../Scripts/ACMG_and_LRs/ACMG_auto_somatic.R",
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_input/Clinvar_path_plus_somatic_codes_240426.tsv",
             hotspots,
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_path_ACMG_somatic_240426.tsv"))

system(paste("Rscript ../../Scripts/ACMG_and_LRs/ACMG_auto_somatic.R",
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_input/Clinvar_benign_plus_somatic_codes_240426.tsv",
             hotspots,
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_benign_ACMG_somatic_240426.tsv"))

system(paste("Rscript ../../Scripts/ACMG_and_LRs/ACMG_auto_somatic.R",
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_input/Clinvar_VUS_plus_somatic_codes_240426.tsv",
             hotspots,
             "../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_VUS_ACMG_somatic_240426.tsv"))
```
